title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced an updated agent platform with unified Agent Builder featuring no-code/low-code design, Agent Registry for reusable components, enterprise governance with time-travel debugging, and integrated evaluation and simulation capabilities. The platform supports multi-agent workflows and agent-to-agent communication.
writeup: This video covers Google Cloud's updated agent platform, centered on a unified Agent Builder with no-code and low-code design and an Agent Registry for reusable components. It details enterprise governance features, including time-travel debugging, plus integrated evaluation and simulation. The platform supports multi-agent workflows and agent-to-agent communication, which matters for teams orchestrating and observing agents at scale.
